What We Manufacture

Our Capabilities

From single-piece dished ends to full structural bending runs, engineered and pressed in-house.

01

Dished Ends Manufacturing

Custom forming of Torispherical, Ellipsoidal, and Hemispherical ends for industrial tanks, boilers, and pressure vessels.

Mild SteelStainless Steel
02

Plate Bending & Rolling

High-precision bending of heavy steel plates, structural sections, and industrial channels to your engineering blueprint.

Sheet RollingStructural Sections
03

Heavy Pressing & Fabrication

Custom hydraulic press work, pipe and bar bending, edge preparation, and structural assembly for heavy industry.

Hydraulic PressingPipe & Bar Bending
